name: Snickerdoodles
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 30 Minutes Bake Time: 7 to 8 Minutes
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the Butter Flavor Crisco, 1 1/2 cups sugar, eggs, milk, and vanilla until well blended.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the flour, cream of tartar, baking soda, and salt. Gradually add this mixture to the Creamed mixture and stir until combined.
4. Roll dough into 1-inch balls.
5. Roll each ball in the granulated sugar and cinnamon mixture (combine in a small bowl). You can also place 2-3 dough balls at a time in a zip-lock bag, shake to coat, then place on an ungreased baking sheet about 2 inches apart.
6. Bake for 7 to 8 minutes at 400°F. Remove from the oven and transfer to a cooling rack.
This recipe makes approximately 6 dozen 1 1/2 inch cookies.
